PROJECTS.TITLE: Projects
PROJECTS.SUBTITLE: Manage your GitHub repositories
PROJECTS.PATH_HINT: Write a path to exclude (e.g.: backend/venv)
PROJECTS.BRANCH_NOT_FOUND: ⚠️ Specified branch not found. Please check the branch name.
PROJECTS.DEPLOY_KEY_HINT: Add this Public Key to the "Deploy Keys" section in your GitHub/GitLab repository settings. This allows depl@yes to access the code.
PROJECTS.DEPLOY_KEY_NOT_GENERATED: ⚠️ Deploy Key not yet generated. Please click "Update" to save the project and generate it.
PROJECTS.DEPLOY_SCRIPT_HINT: Choose a template to get started quickly:
PROJECTS.SCRIPT_PLACEHOLDER:
# Write your bash script commands here...
# Example:
# npm install
# npm run build
PROJECTS.SCRIPT_INFO: These commands will run on the server, inside the project root directory, in order.
PROJECTS.ENV_VARS_HINT: These variables will be injected into the project during deployment. Stored encrypted.
PROJECTS.ENV_VARS_INFO: You can add Environment Variables (Secrets) after creating the project.
PROJECTS.DELETE_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to delete the project "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
PROJECTS.EMPTY_DESC: Click the "New Project" button to add your first project

AUTH.LOGIN_SUBTITLE: Sign in to your account to continue
AUTH.WELCOME_BACK_DESC: Sign in to manage your projects and servers.
AUTH.HELLO_FRIEND_DESC: Don't have an account yet? Create one for free and start deploying.

LANDING.HERO_DESC: depl@yes combines SSH, Docker, and Webhooks to deploy your GitHub repos to remote servers automatically, securely, and in seconds.
LANDING.FEATURES_DESC: Deploy your GitHub changes to production instantly without setting up CI/CD infrastructure.
LANDING.FEAT1_DESC: Deploy your chosen branch to your chosen server instantly from the dashboard. No command line needed.
LANDING.FEAT2_DESC: Automatic deploy starts when you push to your repository. No manual CI process management.
LANDING.FEAT3_DESC: Manage servers for different customers or environments (staging, prod) from a single panel.
LANDING.FEAT4_DESC: SSH keys and environment secrets are stored with banking-grade encryption.
LANDING.FEAT5_DESC: Auto-generated deploy keys for each project. Password-based connection is never used.
LANDING.FEAT6_DESC: Monitor every output during the deploy process instantly via WebSocket. Errors are visible immediately.
LANDING.FEAT_DEPLOY_DESC: Deploy your chosen branch to your chosen server instantly from the dashboard. No command line needed.
LANDING.FEAT_WEBHOOK_DESC: Automatic deploy starts when you push to your repository. No manual CI process management.
LANDING.FEAT_MULTI_DESC: Manage servers for different customers or environments (staging, prod) from a single panel.
LANDING.FEAT_ENCRYPT_DESC: SSH keys and environment secrets are stored with banking-grade encryption.
LANDING.FEAT_SSH_DESC: Auto-generated deploy keys for each project. Password-based connection is never used.
LANDING.FEAT_LOG_DESC: Monitor every output during the deploy process instantly via WebSocket. Errors are visible immediately.
LANDING.HIW_DESC: Setup process that takes minutes, no engineering team required.
LANDING.SETUP_DESC: Setup process that takes minutes, no engineering team required.
LANDING.STEP1_DESC: Register your server with IP address, SSH port, and username. Just upload your SSH private key.
LANDING.STEP2_DESC: Enter the GitHub repo URL, target branch, and deploy script to run on the server.
LANDING.STEP3_DESC: Deploy with one click from the panel or set up a GitHub Webhook for automatic deployment on every push.
LANDING.TECH_DESC: Production-grade infrastructure built with industry-standard technologies.
LANDING.TECH_GO_DESC: High-performance, low-memory REST API and WebSocket server.
LANDING.TECH_GO: High-performance, low-memory REST API and WebSocket server.
LANDING.TECH_ANGULAR_DESC: Signal-based reactive UI, lazy-loaded components, and clean modular architecture.
LANDING.TECH_ANGULAR: Signal-based reactive UI, lazy-loaded components, and clean modular architecture.
LANDING.TECH_PG_DESC: Reliable relational database management with automatic migration support.
LANDING.TECH_POSTGRES: Reliable relational database management with automatic migration support.
LANDING.TECH_DOCKER_DESC: Quick self-hosting with a single-command Docker Compose template.
LANDING.TECH_DOCKER: Quick self-hosting with a single-command Docker Compose template.
